name: Rice Fermented Veg
steps: Cook congee in ratio of 1:10= rice:water
Leave congee to cool down to 30C
Wash the mustard green with cold water
Drain properly and salt the leaves
Lightly rub the salt into the leaves and line them in glass jar
Once the congee is cool down to around 30C (need to be luke warm still)
Pass through the warm congee through a sieve and pour into the veg to cover, discard the rice grain
Let it ferment for at least a week. May take up to 10 days

notes: Keep an eye on how long it takes to ferment
Try fermenting in vac pack bags
